Name: MenuColorTableParam
Description: Determines the coloring used for various interface elements.

Fields.Name: Menu Color: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the color.

Fields.Name: Menu Color: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the color.

Fields.Name: Menu Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the color.

Fields.Name: Menu Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the color.
